text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Hm? I'm awake. What was that dream I just had, though?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ROARRR! I'm going to buonovate everyone in town! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fleeing Woman
text_block_list.text: Eek! R-run away! It's the Beast of Bliss, Buonogon!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: How come I was a beast?! I don't get it at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is so preoccupied with the details
of her dream that she ends up losing sleep over it.
